ab: a nia kakituluan izua i tjuljivar ta nia umaq, piqadav aken a djemavac a sema kakituluan, sake djavac uta pasa umaq.
ch: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
en: My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

ab: inika kudral a nia kakituluan, inika tjuruvu a kitulutulu, namakakeljakeljang amen a masantalj.
ch: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
en: Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

ab: azua kakedrian a mapuljat namaqepuqepu i kakilaciqan, sa meseljaseljang a benudru, a semanljavaran.
ch: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
en: All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

ab: a mareka sinsi kiseljang tjanuamen uta kivangavang, aicu a nia kakituluan matu tacemkeljan.
ch: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校是個大家庭。
en: The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

ab: piqadav amen a semuap, nia suapan a ljemenguaq aza tatuluan.
ch: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃整潔。
en: We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

ab: izua vayk a zemuking tua qezung, izua vayk a semuap.
ch: 有的人去擦窗戶，有的人去掃地。
en: Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

ab: vayk amen uta semuap tua mareka i putuputung tua kakituluan, nia sikarasudj sa nia sikapangapangalj a sengesengan, namaljenguaq a piqadav a nia kakituluan.
ch: 我們還會打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都很整潔。
en: We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.
